'''nadacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okuriashi|okuriashi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okuriashi|okuriashi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nadacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || nædæchæth || nædæchæj || nædæchæsh || nædæchæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || nadadachath || nadadachaj || nadadachash || nadadacha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || nadachath || nadachaj || nadachash || nadacha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || nadafchafth || nadafchafj || nadafchafsh || nadafchaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || nadachatha || nadachaja || nadachasha || nadachaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || nadachath || nadachaj || nadachash || nadacha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || nadachathal || nadachajal || nadachashal || nadachakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || nadachaathatha || nadachaajaja || nadachaashasha || nadachaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || nadachathan || nadachajan || nadachashan || nadachakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || nadachathaoro || nadachajaoro || nadachashaoro || nadachakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
